task_snapshots.title: 333d-03a: Verify spawn prevention guards in claim_and_spawn_batches
task_snapshots.description: [subtask of 4badf2ea6dca] Verify that the spawn prevention logic at lines 638-652 in task_lifecycle.py correctly prevents spawning agents when a role has more agents than available task batches. Update code if needed to ensure _effective_role_cap calculation accounts for agents exiting due to empty queue.
